coverage.reason: Direct composer component changes should run the project-workspace shard.

required: pnpm -C e2e exec tsx scripts/ui-p0-shards.ts project-workspace
recommended: pnpm -C e2e exec playwright test -c playwright.config.ts ui/app.test.ts --grep '\[P0\]|conversation'

recommended: pnpm -C e2e exec playwright test -c playwright.config.ts ui/app.test.ts ui/app-restoration.test.ts --grep 'file-upload|attachment|\[P0\]'

authorTestEvidence.positiveSignal: A PR that updates a mapped E2E test or reports the mapped command has stronger validation evidence for the matched capability.
authorTestEvidence.riskFlag: If changed files match pathGlobs for P0 coverage but the PR has no matching testPathGlobs change and no reported run evidence, mark changed-covered-code-without-test-evidence.
